query: heavy fog mist obscured figure barely visible silhouette
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/fog_silhouette — anti_aesthetic — figures lost in mist, dissolved silhouettes, monochrome haze

response.objective_caption: A person is positioned before a light-colored brick wall. The figure appears as a layered, translucent shape with horizontal trailing forms that suggest rapid movement. The background consists of uniformly sized rectangular bricks with visible horizontal mortar lines. The overall tones are light whites, cool grays, and faint blue shades.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A surreal, abstract photograph of a person captured with intentional motion blur against a white brick wall. The subject appears as a layered, translucent form with horizontal trailing shapes that dissolve into the background. The image features a muted, faded palette of washed-out whites and pale grays with low vibrancy, creating an ethereal, dreamlike atmosphere where fine details and textures are entirely absent.
